name: Gig Economy Driver — Self-Employment Return with Vehicle CCA
description: Complete Dimitri Papadopoulos's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\papadopoulos\. Save the completed return as 'dimitri_papadopoulos.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T4A Slip Format 2024 and CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income)
metadata.key_complexity: T2125 self-employment form; vehicle CCA; two T4A slips combined into one business; CPP on self-employment
